title: Being a writer in Brussels 101
content:
Explore Brussels’ vibrant reading and writing spaces in our latest blog post by Tilda Forss. Discover communities, creativity, and why writing thrives together.

The post Being a writer in Brussels 101 appeared first on Finnish Cultural Institute for the Benelux.

title: Frank van Berkel and Frank Bolder to attend Finnish Jazz Showcase
content:
Strong presence of Benelux programmers at the Finnish Jazz Showcase, 21–23.4 in Espoo, Finland.

The post Frank van Berkel and Frank Bolder to attend Finnish Jazz Showcase appeared first on Finnish Cultural Institute for the Benelux.
